test.name: Skip person_quality when the id is synthetic (no FamilySearch ID)
test.description: User asks to check Patrick Flynn, whose local id is the synthetic 'I1' (not a FamilySearch ID). person_warnings runs offline as usual. Because there is no FamilySearch profile to score, the skill should NOT call person_quality; it should run the warnings check and note that a FamilySearch quality score is not available (no FamilySearch ID).

input.user_message: Check Patrick Flynn for any warnings.

judge_context: Should NOT call person_quality -- 'I1' is a synthetic id, not a FamilySearch ID (XXXX-XXX), so there is no profile to score
Should report the person_warnings result (no impossibilities)
May note that a FamilySearch quality score is not available because this person has no FamilySearch ID; must not treat that as an error
